tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc -type f \\( -name '*.png' -o -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.jpeg' -o -name '*.gif' -o -name '*.svg' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.pdf' -o -name '*.doc' -o -name '*.docx' -o -name '*.odt' \\) -exec chmod go-r {} + && find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc -type d -exec chmod go-rx {} + && echo 'PERMISSIONS_TIGHTENED' && find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc -type f \\( -name '*.png' -o -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.jpeg' -o -name '*.gif' -o -name '*.svg' -o -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.pdf' -o -name '*.doc' -o -name '*.docx' -o -name '*.odt' \\) | head -20 | xargs -r ls -l"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"chmod go-r /usr/share/pixmaps/*.png /usr/share/pixmaps/*.svg /usr/share/icons/**/*.png /usr/share/icons/**/*.svg 2>/dev/null || true; chmod -R go-rx /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc; echo PERMISSIONS_TIGHTENED; ls -ld /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/share/doc"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
